message:
refactor(python,convert,dispatch): simplify bindings, conversion, and dispatch logic

Python Bindings:
- Consolidate and simplify algorithm, digraph, readwrite Python exports
- Reduce code duplication across binding modules (~250 lines net reduction)

Conversion:
- Simplify conversion logic with cleaner patterns (-127 lines net)

Dispatch:
- Streamline dispatch implementation (-70 lines)

Algorithms:
- Whitespace cleanup

ReadWrite:
- Simplify file I/O logic

Conformance:
- Update reliability budget test assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
